desktop-settings.notify-never.developer_comment: Option to never check for updates

desktop-settings.disabled-updates.string: Update checking is not recommended as you will miss security updates.

desktop-settings.update-checker-not-allo.developer_comment: Message when update checker is not available

desktop-settings.no-devices.developer_comment: Message when no devices are found

desktop-settings.editor-must-be-open.string: Error: Editor must be open to configure media devices
desktop-settings.editor-must-be-open.developer_comment: Error message when editor is not open

desktop-settings.media-devices-changed.string: You must restart the application for microphone or camera changes to take effect.
desktop-settings.media-devices-changed.developer_comment: Message about restarting for device changes

desktop-settings.hardware-acceleration-w.developer_comment: Hardware acceleration when available setting label

desktop-settings.hardware-acceleration-d.string: Disabling hardware acceleration significantly reduces performance. Some projects may run over 100x slower because all rendering work will be done by the CPU. Only use this as a last resort if hardware acceleration causes crashes.

desktop-settings.background-throttling-d.string: Allowing hidden windows to stay active increases CPU usage and reduces battery life.

desktop-settings.bypass-cors.string: Allow extensions to access any website

desktop-settings.bypass-cors-enabled.string: This disables many security features designed to protect you. Malicious projects or extensions will be able to access any website or device on your network.

desktop-settings.exit-fullscreen-on-esca.string: Exit F11 fullscreen mode when Esc is pressed (not editor fullscreen)
desktop-settings.exit-fullscreen-on-esca.developer_comment: Exit fullscreen on escape setting label
